project.name: Kisan AI Shield
project.description: An offline-first, multilingual, AI-powered digital assistant for Indian farmers, providing crop disease detection, localized agricultural advice, hyper-local weather alerts, and dynamic mandi pricing.
project.target_audience: Indian farmers, agricultural extension workers, rural agronomists

backend.routing_strategy: REST API with strict JSON responses

models.name: EfficientNet-B0
models.theoretical_advantage: Balances depth, width, and resolution scaling efficiently, providing high accuracy with a small parameter footprint suitable for edge/mobile contexts.

models.name: MobileNetV2
models.theoretical_advantage: Uses depthwise separable convolutions to drastically reduce computation cost on mobile devices.

computer_vision_engine.data_preprocessing: Image resizing (224x224), Float32 normalization, NumPy Array expanded dimensions

conversational_ai.theoretical_basis: Instruction-tuned Large Language Model acting as an Expert Agronomist, governed by a strict System Prompt setting boundaries (only agricultural advice, safe pesticide usage, precise measurements).

translation_pipeline.workflow: 1. Detect source language -> 2. Translate non-English to English -> 3. Execute LLM Query in English (for highest reasoning quality) -> 4. Translate English response back to source language.

voice_query_flow: User speaks in Local Language via React Native Audio Recorder
Audio file sent as multi-part form data to Flask Backend (/api/ai/voice)
Flask transcribes audio using local STT (or external Speech-to-Text wrapper)
Transcribed text passes through Translation Pipeline (Local -> EN)
English abstract syntax sent to LLM for Agronomy Reasoning
LLM English response passes through Translation Pipeline (EN -> Local)
Text response sent back to UI, rendered, and processed via device native TTS engine
disease_scan_flow: User captures leaf image using React Native Camera
Base64/Multi-part image sent to Flask Backend (/api/scan)
Flask decodes image into PIL Image
Image reshaped to (224, 224, 3) and passed to TensorFlow Graph
Logits passed through Softmax layer for confidence distribution
Top-1 class prediction mapped to Disease/Remedy dictionary
Structured JSON (confidence, diagnosis, remedies) returned to UI

external_integrations.application_logic: Used to generate dynamic alerts like 'Delay Spraying' (if Rain) or 'Early Morning Irrigation' (if Heatwave).

system_resiliency.network_timeouts: Strict 10-second timeouts on all upstream API calls to prevent thread hanging.
system_resiliency.fallback_UIs: Graceful 'Loading' and 'Error' states across all React Native screens if backend is unreachable.
system_resiliency.offline_availability: Cached Crop Data, Schemes, and Activity History via AsyncStorage.
